Weekly sensor report

Window: 2026-07-13 00:00 – 2026-07-19 23:50 (UTC)

Summary

  • Peak temperature this week: 36.8°C in Dining on 2026-07-13 18:10.
  • Lowest temperature this week: 24.4°C in Hall on 2026-07-16 09:30.
  • Peak humidity this week: 51.6% in Hall on 2026-07-13 01:20.
  • Lowest humidity this week: 34.5% in Dining on 2026-07-13 18:20.
  • Mean temperature in the SSH this week was 27.6°C.
  • Mean humidity in the SSH this week was 46.6%.
  • Amp-hours consumed this week: 640.19 Ah.

AI insights

This report is based on sensor data from 2026-07-13 to 2026-07-19. The week's highest temperature was 36.8°C in Dining on 2026-07-13 at 18:10, and the lowest was 24.4°C in Hall on 2026-07-16 at 09:30. Humidity peaked at 51.6% in Hall on 2026-07-13 at 01:20 and bottomed at 34.5% in Dining the same day at 18:20. The tightest condensation margin was 7.1°C in Loft 1, above the 3°C elevated-risk and 1°C high-risk thresholds. Against the CIBSE Guide A standard (21°C living areas, 18°C bedrooms, 40-60% relative humidity), Hall came closest to comfort at 26.7°C and 49.5% humidity, while Bed 3 sat furthest away at 28.1°C and 47.8% humidity against its 18°C bedroom target. Daily mean temperature eased across the week from 28.6°C to 26.2°C, while humidity stayed flat, between 45.6% and 47.7%. On the morning of 2026-07-16, six rooms cooled together by an average of 1.6°C, Kitchen down the most at 2.2°C, consistent with windows opened for ventilation. Separately, on the evening of 2026-07-13, Dining warmed sharply by 8.2°C, from 28.5°C to 36.8°C, while its humidity dropped 12.8 points, from 47.3% to 34.5%, consistent with warm, dry air entering the room, such as an open door or direct sun.

Condensation risk margin

Worst-case (minimum) margin seen per room over the week. Below 3°C is elevated risk, below 1°C is high risk. Bars are coloured by room type — rooms, lofts, and outside — since these swing very differently and shouldn't be judged on the same footing.
